title: Strengthen @Guide strings on every list field for extraction-coverage
description: Proving run produced severe list under-extraction: fixture explicitly listed 3 bugs, recap returned 1 in bugsCaught; fixture listed 3 blocked items, recap returned 1 in caveats; fixture implied 3+ followups, recap returned 1. Diagnosis: the current @Guide strings describe shape ('array of bugs caught', 'array of caveats') but not extraction policy. The FM defaults to summarizing/picking a representative rather than enumerating. Fix: tighten every list field's @Guide with extraction-coverage language. Examples: bugsCaught -> @Guide(description: 'Include EVERY bug, failure, or invalid value mentioned in the transcript. Do not condense, do not pick a representative.'). Same treatment for arcs, wins, decisions, rulesEmerged, openFollowups, caveats. Verify with re-run against the same fixture; expected: bugsCaught.count >= 3, caveats.count >= 3, openFollowups.count >= 3.
resolutionNote: Landed: tightened every @Guide string on the DigikomaRecapModel list fields (arcs, wins, decisions, bugsCaught, rulesEmerged, openFollowups, caveats) with explicit extraction-coverage language ('include EVERY X mentioned', 'do not condense', 'if the transcript names 3 bugs return 3 entries'). Also added an EXTRACTION POLICY block in the prompt covering exhaustive/grounded/specific extraction. Re-run against the same fixture: bugsCaught 1->3, caveats 1->3, arcs 2->5. List under-extraction effectively resolved for fixture-sized inputs.
